mapper.select: /* wif-das-classificationtoteclose-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteCloseWaveSeq - 분류토트마감 웨이브 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_clos_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-classificationtoteclose-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteCloseOrderSeq - 분류토트마감 오더 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_clos_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-classificationtoteclose-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteCloseItemSeq - 분류토트마감 아이템 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_clos_item') AS ITEM_SEQ
